scope.summary: A1e surfaces RLS/VPD visibility in doctor and successful oracle_query results without treating catalog visibility as an absence proof.
out_of_scope: No claim is made that VPD/RLS policy absence can be proven from an empty ALL_POLICIES view.
No change is made to the SQL classifier admission invariant; the query result observation is metadata attached after the existing read gate admits the statement.
No live Oracle D3 lane result is claimed from this close evidence.

entry_points.name: doctor RLS/VPD visibility check
entry_points.trace: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-core rls_vpd_visibility -- --nocapture passed: doctor names a visible ORACLEMCP_D3_VPD policy and warns when ALL_POLICIES returns zero visible rows.

entry_points.name: catalog resolver VPD/RLS observation
entry_points.trace: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp-db --lib vpd_rls -- --nocapture passed: schema observation names visible policies and treats empty ALL_POLICIES as a catalog-blind risk.

entry_points.name: oracle_query result metadata
entry_points.trace: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo test -p oraclemcp --test rls_vpd_visibility -- --nocapture passed: a successful SELECT carries rls_vpd.status and all_policies_probe.visibility metadata paired to resolved relation line-of-sight.

entry_points.name: scoped compile for touched crates
entry_points.trace: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR cargo check -p oraclemcp-db, cargo check -p oraclemcp-core, and cargo check -p oraclemcp all passed against the rebased A1e work.

entry_points.name: source binding
entry_points.trace: git show --stat 5c7a15b1 confirmed the A1e implementation commit includes the seven in-scope paths while later pane commits advanced HEAD independently.

limitations: This is scoped local evidence from the shared checkout; no full-workspace gate is claimed.
D3 live fixture agreement is not re-run here; this close records product surfacing and targeted mocked coverage only.
